interactive_prompts.name: trust_prompt
interactive_prompts.regex: Do you trust the contents of this project|Antigravity CLI requires permission
interactive_prompts.note: agy asks to trust dir on first launch; default selection is 'Yes, I trust this folder'

interactive_prompts.name: quota_exhausted
interactive_prompts.note: Distinguishable from transient rate-limit; usually requires plan upgrade

interactive_prompts.name: permission_prompt
interactive_prompts.note: Belt-and-suspenders alongside --dangerously-skip-permissions; harmless if bypass already accepted it

note: Interactive agy via tmux. Preserves Google AI Pro subscription billing (OAuth). REPL marker is the '? for shortcuts' footer text — unique to the idle state. model_tier is channel=noop: agy 1.0.3 has NO -m/--model flag (verified live 2026-05-31: `agy -m X` -> 'flags provided but not defined: -m' + usage dump, REPL never boots -> exit=80). The 2026-05 'correction' to channel=flag was wrong and caused every agy-tmux launch to fail the 60s REPL boot wait; reverted to noop. model_tier_map retained as documentation of the implicit default (gemini-3.5-flash); agy selects its model server-side / via config, not a launch flag. See docs/architecture/cli-capability-matrix.md.
